name: Graduation Berry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crunch the granola with a rolling pin and mix it with melted butter.
2. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie dish and set aside.
3. In a blender, combine egg yolks, lemon juice, lemon rind, sugar, cream cheese, and yogurt.
4. Add ice cubes until the mixture is smooth; then add half of the sliced strawberries.
5. Pour over the crust and top with the remaining whole berries.
6. Chill until serving. The fresh strawberries are ideal for this pie, but any seasonal berry can be substituted to make graduation a grand celebration.
